overview.value: D-Orbit describes itself as the market leader in space logistics and transportation, with a track record of space-proven technologies and successful missions. Its services include commercial launch and deployment solutions enabled by its proprietary orbital transfer vehicle, the ION Satellite Carrier, which the company says can reduce time from launch to operations by up to 85 percent. The company was founded in 2011 by Luca Rossettini and Renato Panesi, and is headquartered in Italy with offices in Portugal, Greece, the UK, and the United States. It operates as a registered benefit corporation.

focus.value: Space logistics and transportation, including satellite launch and deployment via the ION Satellite Carrier
